title: AtmaNirbhar Auto Industry: The China Factor

summary.about: How dependent India’s automotive supply chain remains on Chinese components despite self-reliance goals.
summary.audience: Automotive executives, sourcing teams and Indian industrial policymakers.
summary.method: Reviews official trade, auto-component, investment and industry data alongside supply-chain conditions.
summary.insights: China supplied about 27% of India’s auto-component imports, making rapid decoupling costly and likely to raise prices in the short run.
